narrative: Expanded the repository with a small Node.js scaffold to spark future custom commands. This script welcomes users to the WODE environment and signals a place for experimentation.
user_input: scaffold anything that this goal could need, be innovators and surprise me
scene_before: The fork only documented installation steps without showing how to extend functionality.
scene_after: Developers can now run `npm run wode` to see a starting script, inspiring them to build more automation around Claude Code.
